name: Shopify store owners processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Shopify store owners processing 10–20 invoices/month, failed subscription payment renewals cause cash flow gaps. We alert finance ops instead of manual tracking of payment renewals.
problem_solved: Failed subscription payment renewals leading to cash flow gaps.
features: Manual entry option for tracking renewals

must_have_features: Manual entry option for tracking renewals
